final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster (short-video vertical cover) for "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", a gaming monitor product launch.

Style/medium: minimalist high-end flat design, clean typographic hierarchy, inspired by Apple product launch key visuals
Composition: rule-of-thirds vertical layout — bold headline occupies upper third, product visual anchors center third, tagline sits in lower third; 9:16 aspect ratio
Subject: gaming monitor with ultra-thin bezels, glowing screen emitting vivid color, positioned as hero product; oversized bold headline text as primary visual anchor
Scene/backdrop: deep matte black background with subtle dark gradient, no clutter
Lighting/mood: single cool-blue rim light on monitor edges, soft ambient glow from screen surface, high-tech and premium mood
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, electric blue and white as accent hierarchy, minimal use of vivid color to keep premium restraint
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as main headline (oversized, bold, eye-catching); "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as subtitle
Constraints: headline must be the largest typographic element on the canvas; layout must hold visual clarity as a mobile thumbnail at small sizes; no more than three type sizes on screen
Avoid: busy backgrounds, lens flares as filler, gradient rainbow overload, generic gaming RGB cliché, cluttered layout, drop shadows on text
